discussions.title: STORY MAPPING
discussions.detail: Exposition(beginning): Medusa (Example)Long ago, in ancient Greece, there lived a beautiful young woman named Medusa. She had long, shining golden hair and was admired by everyone who saw her. Medusa served as a priestess in the magnificent Temple of Athena, the wise goddess of wisdom and warfare. The temple stood on a rocky hill overlooking the sparkling blue sea, surrounded by olive trees and marble statues.The temple was a peaceful and sacred place where silence and respect were expected. Medusa spent her days...

discussions.title: Youth Parliament
discussions.detail: Greetings!This is to inform you that the Youth Parliament will be conducted on Thursday, 9 July, from 9:00 a.m. to 2:40 p.m.The agenda for the parliamentary session is as follows:How can India generate more employment opportunities for youth?How can India strengthen food safety and standards to protect public health?Students will participate in parliamentary discussions, present their viewpoints, and engage in constructive debates on these important national issues.Additionally, an online orientation session for t...

discussions.title: Youth Parliament

discussions.title: Design Championship 2026 – Global Design Competition | Register Now
discussions.detail: Dear Students,Registrations are now open for Design Championship 2026, India’s biggest online design competition for students aged 6–16 years. Participation is free, and students can compete in:App Design, Game Design, Graphic Design, 3D Design, Coding, Web Design, Movie Making, and Circuit Simulation.Students from India, the UAE, and Saudi Arabia can participate. The competition has two rounds: an online Regional Round followed by the Grand Finale in Delhi. Winners at both the regional and national levels will re...
